content:
type: SURVEY
files: tiktoken/core.py
note: Adding optional return_positions parameter to Encoding.encode() to track starting char position of each token; will decode text incrementally using self.decode_single_token_bytes per token to compute positions. Only touching encode() method body/signature.

fields.note: Adding optional return_positions parameter to Encoding.encode() to track starting char position of each token; will decode text incrementally using self.decode_single_token_bytes per token to compute positions. Only touching encode() method body/signature.
